ADVENTURECRAFT.ModuleDescription: A crafting system for DnD5e — combine items and create reusable recipes.

Hint.DragItemsHere: Drag items here from actor sheet or compendium
Hint.NoRecipes: No recipes saved yet. Create recipes in the Crafting window.
Hint.TagsTooltip: Tags (comma-separated): item can match by name OR any listed tag
Hint.CritThresholdTitle: Critical craft success when roll total ≥ DC + N (default 5). On a failed check, critical failure when total ≤ DC − N. Large N makes crit success very rare.
Hint.DamageTypeMulti: Choose types from the list below; each appears as a tag above. On a critical craft success one checked type is chosen at random.
Hint.DamageTypeMultiTitle: Optional. If none are checked, a default is used when applying the bonus (weapon → slashing, otherwise force).
Hint.SelectActivities: Select activities to include in the new item.
Hint.SelectProps: Check properties to include. Values can be edited.
Hint.DropIngredientsForRecipe: Drop items that are required to craft the result.
Hint.DropResultTemplate: Drop an item as a template.
Hint.CheckResultProps: Check properties to include in the crafted result. Edit values as needed.
Hint.CritAuto: Uses the result item type to pick a default bonus (dnd5e 4.4+ fields).
Hint.CritPool: Define several possible bonuses. On a critical success, the crafter picks one option (or skips). Optional size roll JSON maps die total → how many random options are shown.
Hint.CritQualityNamesTitle: On critical craft success: random quality word in the new item name and an extra line in the craft chat message.

Dialog.SuggestCritPoolContent: Replace current pool options with suggestions for this result item type?
Dialog.ConfirmCraftMasteryGuaranteed: You have mastered this recipe — the craft check succeeds automatically (no roll, no critical success).
Dialog.ConfirmCraftMasteryCritRoll: You have mastered this recipe — success is automatic. A check will be rolled for critical success only (failure is not possible).
Dialog.DeleteRecipeContent: Delete recipe {name}? This cannot be undone.
Dialog.ForgetRecipeContent:
Remove recipe {name} from {actor}'s inventory?
World recipe will remain untouched.
Dialog.DeleteBookContent:
Delete book {name}?
Recipes will remain but lose book association.
Dialog.TagsPrompt: Comma-separated tags for ingredient matching (e.g. gem, red):

Mastery.ThresholdHint: Successful crafts needed before the check auto-succeeds.
Mastery.AllowCritRoll: At mastery: roll for critical success (success is still automatic)
Mastery.TiersHint: After this many successful crafts, subtract from the check DC. Tiers apply before the mastery threshold (guaranteed success).

Origin.PersistFailed: Could not save crafting origin on the new item. Check permissions or ask the GM.
Origin.NoOrigin: This item has no crafting origin recorded.

ShoppingList.ChatEmpty: {actor} has no recipes on the shopping list.
ShoppingList.ChatAllInStock: {actor}: all ingredients for wishlist recipes are in stock.

Message.StationRequired: This recipe must be crafted at a station.
Message.StationTierTooLow: This station is too low tier (requires tier {tier}).
Message.CritPoolSkipped: Critical craft success — bonus effect skipped.
Message.NoCraftingPermissions: You have no permission to use Combine Items or Create Recipe. Ask the GM to raise your role or change AdventureCraft permissions.
Message.NoRecipesYet: No recipes yet. Create the first one!
Message.ImportFailed: Failed to import recipes. Check the file format.
Message.NoActorSelected: No actor selected. Open the crafting window from an actor sheet.
Message.NoActiveCharacter: No active character. Open the hub from a character sheet.
Message.ToolNotFound: Tool «{tool}» not found — rolling without tool.

CritAuto.PreviewNoResult: Add a result item to see the auto bonus preview.

Settings.Title: AdventureCraft — Settings
Settings.PermissionsHint: Choose the minimum role required for each operation. Users below the threshold won't see the UI and can't trigger the action.

Perm.createRecipeHint: Saving new world recipes from the «Create Recipe» tab. Crafting from recipes the character already knows (My Recipes) does not use this permission.
Perm.createBookHint: Create, rename, and delete recipe books.
Perm.editAnyRecipeHint: Edit recipes that don't belong to this user.
Perm.deleteAnyRecipeHint: Delete recipes from the world (not just from inventory).
Perm.viewAllRecipesHint: Show the «All Recipes» tab in the Hub.
Perm.combineItemsHint: Use the «Combine Items» tab (requires the feature toggle).
Perm.viewShoppingListHint: When GM shopping lists are enabled, view another character's wishlist in Hub and post their shortage summary to chat.

Settings.ShoppingListGmEnabledName: GM can view player shopping lists
Settings.ShoppingListGmEnabledHint: Allows users with the permission below to see wishlist markers on another character's recipes and post their aggregated shortage to chat.
Settings.RecordCraftingOriginName: Record crafting origin on new items
Settings.RecordCraftingOriginHint: When enabled, newly crafted items store provenance in flags and append a crafting-origin block to the item description. Players can post origin to chat from the item sheet header.
Settings.DebugLoggingHint: Logs combine/recipe debug plus each craft check: DC, crit threshold, roll total, d20 (if any), and whether crit success fired (total ≥ DC + threshold, not nat 20 alone).
Settings.ShowRecipeResultPropsHint: On the «Create Recipe» tab, show the long list of template fields as a collapsible section. When off, the full item template is kept and recipes do not expose per-field overrides in the UI.
Settings.MigrationHint: Old format recipes detected (world settings). Click the button below to transfer them to Foundry items. Old data will remain in settings as a backup.
Settings.MigrationDetected: AdventureCraft: old format recipes detected. Open AdventureCraft settings to migrate.
Settings.MigrationComplete: Migration complete — {bookCount} books, {recipeCount} recipes transferred to items.
Settings.MenuHint: Configure permissions, diagnostics, and recipe editor options.
Settings.BridgeRequiredHint: Enable the adventurecraft-dnd5e bridge module to change combine and recipe editor options.

Status.FeatureDisabled: Item combination feature is temporarily disabled.
Status.EnableInSettings: Enable it in Module Settings → AdventureCraft → Configure.

Station.SectionHint: If enabled, this recipe can only be crafted at a station token (not from the normal Hub).

Error.OnlyItems: Only items can be dropped here.
Error.DropOneItem: Drop at least one item before creating.
Error.EnterItemName: Please enter a name for the new item.
Error.NeedRecipeResultForCritPool: Add a result item before suggesting a crit pool.
Error.NoPermission: You don't have permission for this action.
Error.BridgeRequired: Enable the adventurecraft-dnd5e bridge module to create or edit recipes.
Error.CritPoolEmpty: Crit pool must include at least one option.
Error.CritPoolSizeTable: Size roll requires a non-empty JSON table.
Error.CritPoolSizeRowRange: Size table row #{row}: min cannot exceed max.
Error.CritPoolSizeJson: Size table must be valid JSON array.
Error.MasteryNeedsCheck: Enable a craft check before using recipe mastery.
Error.MasteryTierCountsOrder: Mastery tier craft counts must increase.
Error.MasteryTierAtThreshold: Each tier must require fewer crafts than the mastery threshold.
Error.CombineActorInventoryOnly: Combine only accepts items already in this character's inventory.
Error.CombineRequiresActor: Select a character before combining items.
Error.CombineSourceNotInInventory: A source item is no longer in the character's inventory. Remove it and try again.
Error.NotActorOwner: You can only craft or combine items for characters you own.

Warning.MasteryTierDcOrder: Later mastery tiers usually should not reduce DC less than earlier tiers.
